basics.name: Daniel Ilies
basics.label: Full-Stack Developer
basics.summary: Full-Stack Engineer with ~4 years experience in Java, Node.js, and modern frontend frameworks (React, Vue). Delivered production solutions including ML-integrated systems and automation tools. Available for remote B2B or employment.

work.name: GreenSoft
work.summary: Backend Java development on an EU government project, working within a professional software team.
highlights: Developing and maintaining Java-based backend services for an EU government project using Form.io for dynamic form management.
Implemented CAPTCHA and email verification logic conditionally based on user authentication state.
Proposed and built a reusable, config-driven form component adopted as team standard.
Contributing to full SDLC including code reviews, testing, and Agile ceremonies.

work.name: Trood
work.summary: Delivered end-to-end production features for the Rizq Launcher MVP.
highlights: Delivered production features for Rizq Launcher MVP, writing backend logic in Go.
Collaborated on Next.js UI integration and maintained cross-service data consistency.
Solved complex authorization issues including reliable 2FA management across independent codebases.

work.name: DevelBox
work.summary: Led frontend initiatives and engineered ML-integrated solutions in production.
highlights: Led frontend refactor/migration (Vue 2 → Vuetify), improving page load times by ~25%.
Engineered AdCognition: end-to-end ML ad detection system with 90%+ accuracy using TensorFlow/TF.js.
Developed RoboGPT (NVIDIA Isaac Sim + OpenAI APIs), reducing manual simulation inputs by ~30%.
Partnered with UI/UX for responsive builds; performed code reviews and mentored juniors.

work.name: BigFoot Company
work.summary: Built full-stack retargeting platform as most senior engineer on a young team.
highlights: Developed core UI and workflows with Nuxt 3, Vue 3, Vuetify, and Pinia.
Implemented responsive design and cross-browser compatibility.
Acted as most senior engineer; mentored juniors and established CI/CD practices.

courses: Bachelor Thesis: Building a Modern Fullstack Web Application

awards.title: 1st Place Innovation Contest
awards.summary: Won for 'Otis' automation tool that streamlined templating and email workflows.

projects.name: AdCognition – End-to-End ML Ad Detection System
projects.description: Production Chrome extension for real-time ad detection with Python/TensorFlow training stack and TF.js deployment.
highlights: Achieved over 90% detection accuracy in production.
Improved accuracy by ~15% through dataset tuning and augmentation.
Built ML pipeline: Python training → TFJS export → Chrome extension.

projects.name: IT-Hub – MERN Stack Social Media Web Application
projects.description: Full-stack social platform demonstrating end-to-end development from React UI to Node/Express APIs and MongoDB.
highlights: Implemented authentication, posts, likes, and collaboration features.
Applied Redux and component-based architecture.
Containerized with Docker for consistent environments.
